description: First designed in FS-479 as a small patrol ship for Vigilitas Interstellar, the Capercaillie swiftly entered production the same year during times of rising scrutiny towards Makosso-Warra's operations. The design saw widespread use across Makosso-Warra's controlled territories, patrolling the space around the corporation's colonies and stations engaging in anti-piracy, loss prevention, and enforcement of territorial claims. Post-ICW, many Capercaillie have been thoroughly reworked by MW Spaceworks to facilitate travel between the greater distances of the company's remaining holdings; notably receiving a streamlined atmospheric extractor system to allow it to act self-sufficiently for some time in undeveloped (or unfriendly) stretches of space. With this added complexity, MW engineers are often contracted with active crews to maintain these systems and/or make further changes to the design. These overhauled vessels are often put to use in emergency response or recovery operations, aiding allied vessels and recovering high-value assets in the ongoing effort to recoup losses from the war. This compact ship has a mixed reputation in the public eye, while often regarded as a visible background element of civilized Frontier space, groups with shaky relations are indiscreetly tagged and monitored while near facilities operated by MW or it's partners.
